testcase.name: test_content_cleanup_processor_strips_content_whitespace

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert '

Mijn tekst

' == 'Mijn tekst'
+ + - Mijn tekst + Mijn tekst ? + +

testcase.failure:
def test_content_cleanup_processor_strips_content_whitespace(): processor = ContentCleanupProcessor()
note = FakeNote("

Mijn tekst

")
result = processor.process(note)
> assert result.content == "Mijn tekst" E AssertionError: assert '

Mijn tekst

' == 'Mijn tekst' E E + E + E - Mijn tekst E + Mijn tekst E ? + E +
tests	est_content_cleanup_processor.py:16: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_default_pipeline_validates_and_processes_notes
testcase.failure:
def test_default_pipeline_validates_and_processes_notes(): report = ImportReport(source="test.enex", importer="evernote")
context = PipelineContext( source_path=Path("test.enex"), output_path=Path("output"), importer_name="evernote", report=report, )
notes = [ FakeNote( title=" Geldige notitie ", content="

Inhoud

", attachments=[ FakeAttachment(filename="image.png"), ], metadata={"guid": "abc"}, ), FakeNote( title="", content=None, attachments=[ FakeAttachment(filename=""), ], metadata=None, ), ]
pipeline = PipelineFactory.create_default()
result = pipeline.run(notes, context)
assert len(result) == 2
assert result[0].title == "Geldige notitie" > assert result[0].content == "Inhoud" E AssertionError: assert '

Inhoud

' == 'Inhoud' E E + E + E - Inhoud E + Inhoud E ? + E +
tests	est_default_pipeline_integration.py:57: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_note_validator_errors_on_missing_content
testcase.failure:
def test_note_validator_errors_on_missing_content(): validator = NoteValidator()
result = validator.validate(FakeNote(title="Title", content=None))
assert result.has_errors is True > assert result.messages[0].code == "note-missing-content" E AssertionError: assert 'note-missing-body' == 'note-missing-content' E E - note-missing-content E ? ^ ^^^^^ E + note-missing-body E ? ^ ^^
tests\test_note_validator.py:27: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_note_validator_accepts_valid_note

failure.message: AssertionError: assert True is False + where True = ValidationResult(messages=[ValidationMessage(level='error', code='note-missing-body', message='Note has no body', context=None)]).has_errors

testcase.failure:
def test_note_validator_accepts_valid_note(): validator = NoteValidator()
result = validator.validate(FakeNote(title="Title", content="Hello"))
> assert result.has_errors is False E AssertionError: assert True is False E + where True = ValidationResult(messages=[ValidationMessage(level='error', code='note-missing-body', message='Note has no body', context=None)]).has_errors
tests\test_note_validator.py:35: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_pipeline_factory_default_pipeline_keeps_valid_notes

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert [ImportMessage(level='error', message='Note has no body', context={'code': 'note-missing-body'})] == []
Left contains one more item: ImportMessage(level='error', message='Note has no body', context={'code': 'note-missing-body'})
Full diff: - [] + [ + ImportMessage( + level='error', + message='Note has no body', + context={ + 'code': 'note-missing-body', + }, + ), + ]

testcase.failure:
def test_pipeline_factory_default_pipeline_keeps_valid_notes(): report = ImportReport(source="test.enex", importer="evernote")
context = PipelineContext( source_path=Path("test.enex"), output_path=Path("output"), importer_name="evernote", report=report, )
pipeline = PipelineFactory.create_default()
notes = [ FakeNote(title="Valid", content="Content"), ]
result = pipeline.run(notes, context)
assert result == notes > assert report.errors == [] E AssertionError: assert [ImportMessage(level='error', message='Note has no body', context={'code': 'note-missing-body'})] == [] E E Left contains one more item: ImportMessage(level='error', message='Note has no body', context={'code': 'note-missing-body'}) E E Full diff: E - [] E + [ E + ImportMessage( E + level='error', E + message='Note has no body', E + context={ E + 'code': 'note-missing-body', E + }, E + ), E + ]
tests\test_pipeline_factory.py:58: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_pipeline_factory_default_pipeline_cleans_content
testcase.failure:
def test_pipeline_factory_default_pipeline_cleans_content(): report = ImportReport(source="test.enex", importer="evernote")
context = PipelineContext( source_path=Path("test.enex"), output_path=Path("output"), importer_name="evernote", report=report, )
pipeline = PipelineFactory.create_default()
notes = [ FakeNote(title="Title", content="

Content

"), ]
result = pipeline.run(notes, context)
> assert result[0].content == "Content" E AssertionError: assert '

Content

' == 'Content' E E + E + E - Content E + Content E ? + E +
tests	est_pipeline_factory.py:98: AssertionError
